text:
Emit `lillist://task/<id>` from widget task rows and open that specific task
in-app. The pure `DeepLink` parser already supports `.task`, and the app side is
partially scaffolded/reserved (`AppEnvironment.pendingOpenTaskID` +
`TasksView` consumption). Thread a per-row URL through `WidgetFilterCardView`,
wire `pendingOpenTaskID`, and drain it in `TasksView`.
(Priority: medium. Labels: widget, deep-link.)
